scope: P4.2 Neumann-budget interface for upgrading the conditional AR majorant to a product-space theorem

K_AR_prod.meaning: structural product-max bound from the product-space contract

q_AR_scalar.meaning: checked scalar contraction majorant before Neumann-error slots

q_hodge_uniform.role: Defect between the fibrewise Hodge inverse bound and the beta-weighted product norm over the full fibration.
q_hodge_uniform.formula: sup ||G_f||_{A_beta source -> A_beta correction} / K_H_K3 - 1, positive part
q_hodge_uniform.required_artifact: uniform fibrewise Hodge inverse theorem in the product norm
q_hodge_uniform.acceptance_test: Provide a certified upper bound value <= target_upper_bound.

candidate_artifact.note: Candidate only; the slot remains pending_exact_certificate.

q_comm_FH_Gf.role: Neumann error from commutators of F_H, G_f, d_H, cutoffs, and collar/base transitions.
q_comm_FH_Gf.required_artifact: product-norm commutator certificate for F_H/G_f and collars
q_comm_FH_Gf.acceptance_test: Provide a certified upper bound value <= target_upper_bound.

candidate_value.meaning: candidate Neumann error for F_H/G_f commutators

candidate_artifact.note: Candidate only; the slot remains pending_exact_certificate.

q_projection_residual.role: Residual after replacing d_H Theta=0 by the reduced equation M_eps(h)=0.
q_projection_residual.acceptance_test: Provide a certified upper bound value <= target_upper_bound.

candidate_artifact.note: Candidate only; the slot remains pending_exact_certificate.

q_gauge_transfer.role: Error introduced by transferring between Donaldson gauge, fibrewise coexact gauge, and product-space coordinates.
q_gauge_transfer.acceptance_test: Provide a certified upper bound value <= target_upper_bound.

candidate_artifact.note: Candidate only; the slot remains pending_exact_certificate.

per_slot_target.meaning: initial sufficient target for each missing analytic slot

q_neumann_total_target.meaning: initial sufficient target for sum of Neumann-error slots

current_evaluation.reason: All four Neumann-error slots are pending exact analytic certificates.

acceptance_boundary: This is a budget skeleton, not an AR theorem.
It must not be cited as proving the product-space inverse or closedness.
Promotion requires every slot to carry a certified upper bound and q_AR_scalar + q_neumann_total < 1.
